title: Add Google site verification file for Search Console

requirements.summary: Create a placeholder Google site verification HTML file in frontend/public and update the SeoInfoBanner to guide users through the Search Console verification process
acceptanceCriteria: A file exists at frontend/public/google-site-verification.html that is served as a static asset
The file is accessible at the /google-site-verification.html route when the app is deployed
The file contains clear instructions for the site owner to replace it with the actual Google-provided verification file
The instructions reference the Google Search Console URL (https://search.google.com/search-console) and explain the typical file naming pattern (googleXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.html)
The SeoInfoBanner on the Home page is updated to mention uploading the Google verification file as a step in the Search Console submission process

file_operations.description: Create a placeholder HTML file with instructional content explaining that the site owner must replace this file with the actual verification file downloaded from Google Search Console (https://search.google.com/search-console). The file should explain the typical Google verification file naming pattern (googleXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.html) and content format (google-site-verificationXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX). Include clear step-by-step instructions for obtaining and uploading the actual verification file.

Update the banner content to include guidance about uploading the Google verification file as part of the Search Console submission workflow. Add a step or note explaining that users should replace the placeholder google-site-verification.html file in the public directory with their actual verification file from Search Console before submitting their site for indexing.
